title: Hims Breach Exposes the Most Sensitive Kinds of PHI
summary: Threat actors breached the telehealth brand, and now they may know patients' personal health details. What could they do with that information?

sections.context: This fits the broader data-exposure trend where follow-on abuse of leaked information is common.

title: GlassWorm Campaign Uses Zig Dropper to Infect Multiple Developer IDEs
summary: Cybersecurity researchers have flagged yet another evolution of the ongoing GlassWorm campaign, which employs a new Zig dropper that's designed to stealthily infect all integrated development environments (IDEs) on a developer's machine.
email_summary: Cybersecurity researchers have flagged yet another evolution of the ongoing GlassWorm campaign, which employs a new Zig dropper that's designed to stealthily infect all integrated development environments (IDEs) on a developer's machine.

title: Browser Extensions Are the New AI Consumption Channel That No One Is Talking About
summary: While much of the discussion on AI security centers around protecting ‘shadow’ AI and GenAI consumption, there's a wide-open window nobody's guarding: AI browser extensions.

title: Industrial Controllers Still Vulnerable As Conflicts Move to Cyber
summary: The US government warns programmable logic controllers are being targeted, and research turns up 179 vulnerable operational technology (OT) devices.
email_summary: The US government warns programmable logic controllers are being targeted, and research turns up 179 vulnerable operational technology (OT) devices.

title: Google Rolls Out DBSC in Chrome 146 to Block Session Theft on Windows
summary: Google has made Device Bound Session Credentials (DBSC) generally available to all Windows users of its Chrome web browser, months after it began testing the security feature in open beta.
email_summary: Google has made Device Bound Session Credentials (DBSC) generally available to all Windows users of its Chrome web browser, months after it began testing the security feature in open beta.

title: Marimo RCE Flaw CVE-2026-39987 Exploited Within 10 Hours of Disclosure
summary: A critical security vulnerability in Marimo, an open-source Python notebook for data science and analysis, has been exploited within 10 hours of public disclosure, according to findings from Sysdig.
email_summary: A critical security vulnerability in Marimo, an open-source Python notebook for data science and analysis, has been exploited within 10 hours of public disclosure, according to findings from Sysdig. Tracked as CVE-2026-39987. Severity is rated high.
card_summary: A critical security vulnerability in Marimo, an open-source Python notebook for data science and analysis, has been exploited within 10 hours of public disclosure, according to findings from Sysdig.

title: Can Anthropic Keep Its Exploit-Writing AI Out of the Wrong Hands?
summary: Its Mythos Preview model, which can allegedly find and exploit critical zero-days, also comes with certain controls, the vendor said.

sections.context: This story is part of the recurring zero-day pattern where exploitation pressure is highest before broad patch adoption.

email_summary: Its Mythos Preview model, which can allegedly find and exploit critical zero-days, also comes with certain controls, the vendor said. Severity is rated critical.
card_summary: Its Mythos Preview model, which can allegedly find and exploit critical zero-days, also comes with certain controls, the vendor said.

title: Backdoored Smart Slider 3 Pro Update Distributed via Compromised Nextend Servers
summary: Unknown threat actors have hijacked the update system for the Smart Slider 3 Pro plugin for WordPress and Joomla to push a poisoned version containing a backdoor.

sections.context: This fits the broader data-exposure trend where follow-on abuse of leaked information is common.

email_summary: Unknown threat actors have hijacked the update system for the Smart Slider 3 Pro plugin for WordPress and Joomla to push a poisoned version containing a backdoor.
